idea-plugin.name: ScalaBPE Navigator
idea-plugin.description:
ScalaBPE Navigator - An IntelliJ IDEA plugin for ScalaBPE framework development, providing efficient navigation and tooling between XML service contracts and Scala/Flow implementation files.

Features

  • .flow Syntax Highlighting - Automatic Scala syntax highlighting for .flow files (requires Scala plugin)
  • XML to Implementation - Click gutter icon on XML message tags to jump to .scala/.flow files
  • XML to Call Sites - Ctrl+Click message name to navigate to invoke() call locations
  • Reverse Navigation - Ctrl+Click class names or comments in Scala/Flow files to jump back to XML definitions
  • Invoke to XML - Ctrl+Click invoke("svcName.msgName") strings to jump to XML contracts
  • Hover Documentation - Ctrl+Hover or Ctrl+Q to view request/response parameter info
  • Smart Completion - Auto-complete serviceName.messageName in invoke() calls with editable parameter templates

Prerequisites

  • Project must contain standard ScalaBPE directory structure: avenue_conf/ (XML contracts) and compose_conf/ (implementation files)
  • Scala plugin recommended for .flow file syntax highlighting
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.1

  • 修复：与 IntelliJ IDEA 2025.2.x 的 Kotlin 运行时版本对齐，解决「不兼容当前 IDE」安装问题

1.0.0

  • 初始发布
  • .flow 文件 Scala 语法高亮（需安装 Scala 插件）
  • XML ↔ Scala/Flow 双向导航（Gutter 图标 + Ctrl+Click）
  • Invoke 调用点导航与多目标选择
  • XML message 悬浮文档（请求/响应参数）
  • Invoke 智能补全 + 模糊匹配 + Tab 参数模板
